metadata.counting_method: Columns are the ten highest-frequency commercially meaningful product types from the taxonomy. Row cells count functionality records linked to product catalogue records mapped to that product type, plus standalone product-like functionality records for the same product type.
metadata.caveat: Cell counts are evidence-presence counts, not market share or revenue estimates. Provider examples are limited in the JSON cells for readability; full evidence remains in source datasets.
